'''kowanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tuberous|tuberous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tuberous|tuberous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kowanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowanithi|kowanithi]] || [[word:kowaniji|kowaniji]] || [[word:kowanishi|kowanishi]] || [[word:kowaniki|kowaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowanuthuthu|kowanuthuthu]] || [[word:kowanujuju|kowanujuju]] || [[word:kowanushushu|kowanushushu]] || [[word:kowanukuku|kowanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowanuthu|kowanuthu]] || [[word:kowanuju|kowanuju]] || [[word:kowanushu|kowanushu]] || [[word:kowanuku|kowanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowanufthuf|kowanufthuf]] || [[word:kowanufjuf|kowanufjuf]] || [[word:kowanufshuf|kowanufshuf]] || [[word:kowanufkuf|kowanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowanethe|kowanethe]] || [[word:kowaneje|kowaneje]] || [[word:kowaneshe|kowaneshe]] || [[word:kowaneke|kowaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowanothotho|kowanothotho]] || [[word:kowanojojo|kowanojojo]] || [[word:kowanoshosho|kowanoshosho]] || [[word:kowanokoko|kowanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowanotho|kowanotho]] || [[word:kowanojo|kowanojo]] || [[word:kowanosho|kowanosho]] || [[word:kowanoko|kowanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowanofthof|kowanofthof]] || [[word:kowanofjof|kowanofjof]] || [[word:kowanofshof|kowanofshof]] || [[word:kowanofkof|kowanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfthÃŸf|kowanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfjÃŸf|kowanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfshÃŸf|kowanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfkÃŸf|kowanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kowanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kowanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kowanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kowanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfthÃŸf|kowanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfjÃŸf|kowanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfshÃŸf|kowanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfkÃŸf|kowanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfthÃŸf|kowanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfjÃŸf|kowanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfshÃŸf|kowanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kowanÃŸfkÃŸf|kowanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kowanÃḊthÃḊ|kowanÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kowanÃḊjÃḊ|kowanÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kowanÃḊshÃḊ|kowanÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kowanÃḊkÃḊ|kowanÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kowanathatha|kowanathatha]] || [[word:kowanajaja|kowanajaja]] || [[word:kowanashasha|kowanashasha]] || [[word:kowanakaka|kowanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kowanatha|kowanatha]] || [[word:kowanaja|kowanaja]] || [[word:kowanasha|kowanasha]] || [[word:kowanaka|kowanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kowanafthaf|kowanafthaf]] || [[word:kowanafjaf|kowanafjaf]] || [[word:kowanafshaf|kowanafshaf]] || [[word:kowanafkaf|kowanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kowanasha|kowanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kowanshÃḋsha|kowanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kowanrosha|kowanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kowanmusha|kowanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kowanyasha|kowanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokowankshÃḋsha|gokowankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokowankrosha|gokowankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokowankmusha|gokowankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokowankyasha|gokowankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kowawanasha|kowawanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kowawanshÃḋsha|kowawanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kowawanrosha|kowawanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kowawanmusha|kowawanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kowawanyasha|kowawanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokowawankshÃḋsha|gokowawankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokowawankrosha|gokowawankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokowawankmusha|gokowawankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokowawankyasha|gokowawankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kewÃḊnasha|kewÃḊnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kewÃḊnshÃḋsha|kewÃḊnshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kewÃḊnrosha|kewÃḊnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kewÃḊnmusha|kewÃḊnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kewÃḊnyasha|kewÃḊnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokewÃḊnkshÃḋsha|gokewÃḊnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokewÃḊnkrosha|gokewÃḊnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokewÃḊnkmusha|gokewÃḊnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokewÃḊnkyasha|gokewÃḊnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kowfanasha|kowfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kowfanshÃḋsha|kowfanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kowfanrosha|kowfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kowfanmusha|kowfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kowfanyasha|kowfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokowfankshÃḋsha|gokowfankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokowfankrosha|gokowfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokowfankmusha|gokowfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokowfankyasha|gokowfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
